description: BlogPost.astro is the single-post layout and primary render surface for blog frontmatter: it destructures title, description, pubDate, updatedDate, and heroImage from the schema-typed props and renders them (title/heroImage/dates in the article, title and description into BaseHead meta). The field set is defined by the Zod schema in content.config.ts; renaming or removing a rendered field, or adding a display-worthy field, requires a matching change here. astro build does not type-check .astro templates, so drift is silent.
